text: Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par unhe kya pata ki bedridden bapu ki seva aur khet ka karza mujhe sone nahi deta. Main kisan hoon, mera rukna matlab poore parivaar ka bhookha marna hai, isliye thakan chahe jitni ho mujhe endurance dikhani hi padegi. Hospital ka kharcha uthane ke liye mujhe bina ruke bas kaam karte rehna hai kyunki mere paas thakne ka koi haq nahi.

Bapu ko dementia hai aur wo pehchante nahi, par unki seva mera dharma hai bhale hi Doctor meri takleef ko 'natak' samajh kar dismiss kar dein. Crop failure ke baad sahukar ka dabaav aur ghar ki zimmedari ke beech main afford nahi kar sakta ki apni mental health pe dhyan doon. Mujhe bas chalte rehna hai kyunki ek mard aur kisan hone ke naate mera rukna meri mardangi pe sawal hoga.

Moneylender roz darwaze pe aata hai aur yahan bapu ki bimari khatam nahi hoti, aise mein Doctor ka 'stress' bolna mazak lagta hai. Main exhausted hoon par endurance hi mera sahara hai kyunki agar main khet pe nahi gaya toh hospital ka kharcha kahan se aayega? Mere liye rona ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta, bas parivaar ke liye mujhe khada rehna hi padega.

Doctor ne phir stress ki goli de di, par unhe nahi dikhta ki ek kisan ka poora din bedridden baap ki gandagi saaf karne aur karze ki chinta mein nikal jata hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par rukkne ka matlab hai 'log kya kahenge' ki bete ne baap ko laawarish chhod diya. Mujh par zimmedari ka itna bojh hai ki main bas ek machine ki tarah har din wahi mushaqqat kiye ja raha hoon.

Jab Doctor ne kaha ye sab dimaag ka khel hai, toh mujhe laga unhe meri kismat ka pata hi nahi jahan crop failure ke baad caregiving ka koi support system nahi hai. Main afford nahi kar sakta ki bimar baap ko chhod kar aaram karoon kyunki unki seva mera farz hai aur karza meri sacchai. Endurance hi mera asli dharma hai, chahe sharir saath de ya na de, mujhe bas kisan bankar lade rehna hai.
